key_takeaways: Flipkart scale: 100M+ products, 500M+ users, 10M+ daily transactions
Interview rounds: 2 coding + 1 system design + 1 behavioral (4 rounds total)
Focus areas: large-scale distributed systems, recommendation systems, search, inventory
Flipkart-specific: category-specific problems, seller ecosystem, logistics routing
Leadership principles: Flipkart has its own 8 leadership principles (customer first, bias for action, etc.)
System design must address: consistency at scale, CAP trade-offs, failure modes
